docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,787.60 FILED BY SUENAGA, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, FENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUENAGA, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, FENG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED JAN-21-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, FENG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-18-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, FENG
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, FENG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUENAGA, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, FENG $1,786.60 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,851.60, PLAINTIFF EXITED A PARKING PLACE IN FRONT OF SAFEWAY STORE ON TARAVAL. DEFENDANT IN A MINI COOPER RAN INTO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE DRIVERS SIDE BY MERGING INTO HIS LANE. WITNESS SENT A TEXT TO PLAINTIFF STATING HE SAW THE MINI COOPER MERGE INTO THE LANE AND HIT THE HONDA CIVIC WHICH PLAINTIFF WAS DRIVING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF STEVEN SUENAGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FENG WANG, IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY AIDONG NI, COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER FOR MANDARIN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S MODEL REPRESENTATION OF THE ACCIDENT IS RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
